name: How do I start a workers comp claim after hurting my shoulder on the job in West Valley City?

mainEntity.name: How do I start a workers comp claim after hurting my shoulder on the job in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report immediately to employer in writing or Utah Labor Commission, detail incident, and cooperate with insurer requests.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Report the injury immediately to your employer in writing; if they refuse, contact the Utah Labor Commission.[1] Provide details like date, time, how it happened, and witnesses to start the process.[5] Key factors: (1) Employer must notify their insurer; (2) Expect medical release requests for 10-year history; (3) Insurer may schedule an independent exam; (4) Failure to cooperate risks denial.[1] Fill out any forms accurately, seek treatment from approved providers, and track all communications. Professional review ensures no missteps early on.

description: Report immediately to employer in writing or Utah Labor Commission, detail incident, and cooperate with insurer requests.[1]
